headline: GE Aerospace Drops 8.7% Year to Date: How Should You Play the Stock?

headline: How The Textron (TXT) Investment Story Is Shifting With New Targets And Buybacks
summary: Textron's updated fair value estimate sits at US$98.95, almost unchanged from the previous US$99.01 level. This keeps the price target story relatively steady. Around that small adjustment, research firms are split, with some using recent earnings reactions to justify higher targets while others trim expectations and stress execution risks despite solid revenue support. As you read on, you will see how to track these shifting targets and what they might mean for your own view on...
